indicators: The spectrum displays 4 distinct emission lines.
The lines observed are: one violet line on the far left, one blue-violet line slightly to its right, one cyan line further to the right, and one red line on the far right of the visible spectrum.

The positions and colors of these lines correspond to the characteristic Balmer series of Hydrogen: approximately 410 nm (violet), 434 nm (blue), 486 nm (cyan), and 656 nm (red). The spacing and relative intensities are consistent with the Hydrogen reference spectrum.
